## 3dslibris 2.7.0

Library folder navigation, continuous D-Pad page turning, unified publisher font scaling, much more reliable HOME button on Old 3DS / 2DS, and rendering fixes.

Notable changes
* Books can now be organized into one level of folders under the configured book directory. The root library shows folders first, then root-level books; opening a folder shows its contents, with `B` or the touch **back** button returning to the root.
* Holding D-Pad Up/Down in reflowable books (EPUB, MOBI, FB2, TXT, RTF, ODT) now repeats page turns automatically after a short delay.
* The "Respect Publisher Font Sizes" toggle has been removed. Publisher CSS font sizes are now always honored, but scaled relative to the user's font-size preference so the reader setting acts as a global zoom.
* **Pressing HOME no longer crashes the menu on Old 3DS / 2DS / some New 3DS XL units.** Several causes have been fixed at once and the app now frees up to ~20 MB before suspending so the HOME menu always has room to launch.

### Stability

* **fix HOME menu crashes when suspending the app**: SD-card writes inside the APT hook callback (running on the system thread) sometimes blocked the HOME menu from getting its acknowledgment in time, which made the menu process crash; lifecycle logging is now deferred to the main thread
* **free up to ~20 MB of RAM before HOME takes over**: PDF/CBZ bitmap caches, preloaded adjacent pages, MuPDF display lists, the inline image cache, and the FreeType glyph bitmap cache are now released the moment the app suspends; everything is rebuilt transparently on resume; this is the main fix for menu-side out-of-memory crashes on Old 3DS / 2DS
* **stop the background reflow worker (EPUB, MOBI, FB2…) before HOME suspends**: the parser thread runs on the New 3DS' second core and used to stay alive across HOME transitions; it is now signalled to exit on suspend and rejoined on resume, removing another source of HOME panics
* **PDF/CBZ workers shut down cleanly on suspend** and re-init on resume; previously a strip render in progress could block the HOME button acknowledgment and cause a system panic
* CIA: drop SystemMode to 80 MB (safer on Old 3DS), enable ExeFS compression, bump `bannertool` to 1.2.2 (matches stable homebrew like Anemone3DS, Checkpoint, moonlight-N3DS)

### Improvements

* #41: **first-level folder navigation in the library**: the root library shows folders first, then root-level books; opening a folder shows the books directly inside it; `B` or touch **back** returns to the root library; folder entries skip metadata indexing, cover extraction, TOC resolution, page cache, warmup jobs, and book-open paths; optional sibling folder covers supported via `FolderName.jpg`
* #24: **continuous D-Pad page turning for reflowable books**: holding D-Pad Up/Down repeats previous/next page turns after an initial delay in EPUB, MOBI, FB2, TXT, RTF, and ODT books; fixed-layout documents keep their existing single-step navigation; new general setting to disable Circle Pad page turns for users affected by analog drift
* #106: **unify publisher font-size rendering**: remove the "Respect Publisher Font Sizes" toggle; publisher CSS `font-size` is always applied; absolute `px` values scale relative to the publisher's declared `body { font-size }` baseline (detected from the book's CSS; defaults to 16px per the CSS standard), so the reader's font-size preference acts as a global scale factor; `em`, `%`, and `rem` values already scaled correctly against the user size
* #108: **CSS `em`/`rem` lengths now resolve against the actual font size**: `text-indent`, `margin-left`, `margin-right`, and related properties previously converted `em` to pixels using a hardcoded 12px baseline; values now resolve against the current rendered font size so paragraph indentation and margins scale correctly when the reader font size is changed
* #83: fix center- and right-aligned paragraphs containing narrow inline images (e.g. `width="15%"`) rendering the image left-aligned at the start of a line; the image pen is now shifted to respect the paragraph's horizontal alignment
* #84: **CSS `margin-top` and `margin-bottom` on block elements**: stanza and section spacing in poetry-style EPUBs now respects the declared CSS margin size; percentage and em values no longer get inflated by the default paragraph spacing floor; when a CSS block margin cannot coexist with a content line on the current screen the parser advances to the next screen, keeping the separator visible and the new block intact

### Fixes

* #98: fix "Clear Cache" not triggering a book re-parse on the next open: after clearing, in-memory pages were reused via the fast path so no new cache was written until restart; fix cancels any pending deferred cache saves before deleting files, then marks layout dirty so all reflowable books re-parse on next open
* #96: fix CSS keyword font sizes in inline `style=` attributes (e.g. `font-size: x-large`) being silently ignored when "Publisher font sizes" is off; keyword sizes are now treated as semantic layout choices like `<big>`/`<small>` and applied in user-size mode, capped to the same ±2× range used by headings
* #99: fix incomplete TOC index in very large anthology EPUBs (regression from v2.6.4): `kMaxPagesInMemory` cap was too low for large multi-story collections, truncating the TOC entry list; raised to accommodate large anthologies
* #100: fix link navigation performance on TOC pages with many inline links: `GetInlineLinkCount()` previously re-scanned the full token buffer on every call; count is now cached per page and invalidated only when the page buffer changes
* fix CSS `margin-top: 0` / `margin-bottom: 0` (and negative values) on block elements incorrectly applying the default inter-paragraph spacing instead of suppressing it; the symptom was unexpected blank lines or early screen advances between tightly-spaced paragraphs (e.g. poetry stanzas with per-line CSS margin overrides)
* #77: fix random blank space before the first heading on a page; whitespace-only text nodes between `<body>` and the first block element incorrectly flagged the screen as containing drawable content, which suppressed top-of-page margin collapsing and wasted up to ~48 px before the title
* fix single-line paragraphs whose text is wrapped in an inline element (e.g. `<p class="centered"><span>…</span></p>`) being bumped to the next screen by the paragraph-start orphan guard; the guard now checks `p->in_paragraph` instead of requiring the stack top to be `TAG_P`, so span-wrapped one-liners are correctly identified and kept in place
* fix overflow detection in page and screen advance firing one line too late; `WouldOverflowReadingScreen` added `line_height + line_spacing` before comparing against the boundary, so content at `pen_y == max_height - bottom_margin` was incorrectly allowed through; replaced with `CurrentLineBeyondReadingScreen` which compares `pen_y` directly
* fix EPUB/MOBI page-cache crashes caused by the experimental compressed-cache writer; cache saving is back to direct page streaming, avoiding the large temporary body buffer and preserving the stable pre-compression cache behavior
* fix a reflowed EPUB rendering case where a forced screen-break token on the already-active right screen was ignored, causing the next block to render on the same visual line as the previous heading and run past the right edge; this affected large anthology pages such as "Sitrus City"
* tighten reflowed page drawing to the configured content bounds so glyph overhang no longer leaks into the right margin

### Infrastructure

* split the 1,286-line `app.cpp` into focused translation units (`app_accessors.cpp`, `app_lifecycle.cpp`, `app_menu_frames.cpp`, `app_views.cpp`); `app.cpp` is now 446 lines and holds only initialization, screens/orientation, status, and gradient backgrounds
* add `-fdata-sections` and drop C++ unwind tables (exceptions are off) to let the linker garbage-collect more dead data; small but free .3dsx size reduction
* keep very noisy block-spacing and screen-advance layout diagnostics behind explicit Makefile flags instead of enabling them in every debug build
* remove stale TODO comments whose underlying refactors have already landed

---

## ❤️ Community Shoutouts

3dslibris wouldn't be the same without your support! This version is dedicated to:

* **Library organization and D-Pad repeat:** Thanks to everyone who requested folder support and continuous page turning, and helped validate the browser and reader flows.
* **Font rendering and CSS fixes:** Thanks to everyone who reported and tested #77, #83, #84, #99, #100, #106, #108, and the poetry stanza spacing fix.
* **HOME button reliability:** Thanks to everyone who reported HOME menu crashes on Old 3DS, 2DS, and New 3DS XL units and shared crash dumps that helped pin down the suspend-path causes.
* **Fueling the Code:** A special thank you to my **Ko-fi supporters**. Your donations help keep the project going and keep me caffeinated!

*Want to support the project? Consider leaving a ⭐ on GitHub or [buying me a coffee](https://ko-fi.com/rigle)!*

### Included assets

- `3dslibris.cia`
- `3dslibris-debug.cia`
- `3dslibris.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-debug.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-sdmc.zip` (runtime files only; pair it with the `.3dsx` asset for Homebrew Launcher installs)
- `3dslibris-source.tar.gz`
